hops.note: PowerUp asset references WeaponPowerUp and gungraph guid 69199acacbf8a7e489ad4aa872efcabd.
Graph asset guid 69199acacbf8a7e489ad4aa872efcabd maps to Reload.cs.meta guid bd387039cacb475381a86f156b54bac2; wiring includes ResultRPM -> GunOutput.RPM.
PickItUp -> EquipWithEvent -> Equip; CurGunGraph assignment happens in WeaponPowerUp.Equip.
GunGraphMB.RegisterGraphEvents -> GunGraph.RegisterEvents -> StartRoutineWithEvents.
hops.snippet: public virtual IEnumerator StartRoutineWithEvents(GunGraphEvents ggEvents, MonoBehaviour instigator = null)

hops.note: ReloadBase.GetValue -> CheckReload -> ReloadRoutine closes the runtime reload chain.

runtime_claim.next_action: node gitnexus/dist/cli/index.js query --unity-resources on --unity-hydration parity --runtime-chain-verify on-demand "Reload NEON.Game.Graph.Nodes.Reloads"
